Title: LEAMS Finance Reporting for Asset Status & Location Changes
Description: Finance requires timely notification of asset status and location changes recorded in LEAMS so they can prepare documentation, approvals, and assess financial statement impacts. Finance currently does not have direct access to LEAMS.

Title: Automated periodic reporting
Description: Generate and distribute a periodic report of LEAMS asset status and location changes to Finance (email and/or shared drive) without requiring LEAMS access.

Title: Receive periodic status change report
Description: As a Finance user, I want to receive a periodic report of asset status changes so that I can prepare documentation and approvals on time.
Acceptance Criteria: Given an asset status changes to Scrap, Obsolescence, or Not in use; When the reporting job runs; Then the report includes the asset ID, previous status, new status, and timestamp.

Title: Receive periodic location change report
Description: As a Finance user, I want to receive a periodic report of asset location changes so that I can validate cost center and entity assignments.
Acceptance Criteria: Given an asset’s cost center or entity location changes; When the reporting job runs; Then the report includes previous and new values, whether the change is temporary or permanent, and timestamp.

Title: Automate report distribution
Description: As a LEAMS admin, I want an automated process to generate and distribute the report so that changes are consistently communicated without manual effort.
Acceptance Criteria: Given the reporting job completes successfully; When Finance checks the configured delivery channel(s); Then the report is available without requiring LEAMS access.

Title: Define reporting cadence
Description: Confirm the preferred reporting cadence (daily/weekly/monthly) with Finance.
Acceptance Criteria: Cadence is documented and approved by Finance.

Title: Define delivery channel(s) and recipients
Description: Confirm delivery method (email/shared drive/both) and recipient list for Finance.
Acceptance Criteria: Delivery method and recipients are documented and validated.

Title: Validate required report fields
Description: Confirm required data fields beyond the minimum set (asset ID, description, status/location changes, timestamps, change actor).
Acceptance Criteria: Field list is documented and aligned with Finance requirements.

Title: Missing move type indicator
Description: Risk: LEAMS may not capture temporary vs permanent moves. Mitigation: add/validate a field to capture move type.

Title: Data quality issues in LEAMS
Description: Risk: inaccurate or incomplete data in LEAMS. Mitigation: add validation/audit checks in the reporting process.

Title: Need historical backfill?
Description: Is a backfill of historical changes required for an initial report?

Title: Include system integration changes?
Description: Should the report include changes made by system integrations as well as users?

Title: Additional statuses?
Description: Are there additional statuses or change types Finance wants to track beyond Scrap, Obsolescence, and Not in use?
